children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Attorney General is authorized to convene a law enforcement task force in Hawaii to facilitate the prosecution of violations of Federal laws, and laws of the State of Hawaii, relating to the wrongful conveyance, sale, or introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species.

children.label: i
children.text: the Office of the United States Attorney for the District of Hawaii;

children.label: iii
children.text: the Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service;

children.label: vii
children.text: the Military Customs Inspection Office of the Department of Defense;

children.label: ix
children.text: the office of the Attorney General of the State of Hawaii;

children.label: xi
children.text: the Hawaii Department of Land and Natural Resources; and

children.label: xii
children.text: such other individuals as the Attorney General deems appropriate.

children.label: B
children.text: The Attorney General shall, to the extent practicable, select individuals to serve on the task force who have experience with the enforcement of laws relating to the wrongful conveyance, sale, or introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species.

children.label: A
children.text: facilitate the prosecution of violations of Federal and State laws relating to the conveyance, sale, or introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species into Hawaii; and

children.label: B
children.text: make recommendations on ways to strengthen Federal and State laws and law enforcement strategies designed to prevent the introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species.

children.label: A
children.text: the progress of its enforcement efforts; and

children.label: B
children.text: the adequacy of existing Federal laws and laws of the State of Hawaii that relate to the introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 5 Consultation
children.text: The task force shall consult with Hawaii agricultural interests and representatives of Hawaii conservation organizations about methods of preventing the wrongful conveyance, sale, or introduction of nonindigenous plant and animal species into Hawaii.
